nasb.text: Now the Pharisees, who were lovers of money, were listening to all these things and were scoffing at Him.

esv.text: The Pharisees, who were lovers of money, heard all these things, and they ridiculed him.

cnv.text: 貪財的法利賽人聽見這些話，就嗤笑耶穌。

ccb.text: 法利赛人向来贪财，他们一面听一面嗤笑耶稣。

csbs.text: 爱钱财的法利赛人听到这些一切话，就讥笑耶稣。
